hypothesis: swarm_combiner.py can execute all 5 merge phases and produce viable output
expect: Self-merge produces INBREEDING zone, 100% convergence, 0 contradictions, single identity
actual: Self-merge: distance=0.000, INBREEDING zone, 1202L deduplicated, 100% convergence, 0 contradictions, single identity type, 20 CONTEXT_DEPENDENT lessons (same-ID pairs with moderate title overlap)
diff: 20 lessons classified CONTEXT_DEPENDENT rather than COMPATIBLE — classifier is conservative on moderate-overlap titles even for identical content. Expected 0 for self-merge.
effect_size: Phase 0-4 gap closed: from 1 tool (compatibility only) to end-to-end merge
